**Reviewer checklist** (for the person reviewing this PR):
- [ ] I ran the code and it works
- [ ] The functions return correct values
- [ ] The code has comments that explain what it does
- [ ] Variable names are clear and make sense
- [ ] I left at least one positive comment
- [ ] I left at least one suggestion or question
